title: OSCORE CBOR helpers do not compile
description: build_info_cbor() uses off without declaring or initializing it, then returns state->payload even though all writes are done through manual indexing. build_oscore_aad() similarly uses inner_off and off without declarations and returns state->payload even though only inner_state exists. Trigger: compile lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c. Bad behavior: OSCORE code cannot build, blocking any Zephyr configuration that enables it. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:161-258 and :301-410.
close_reason: Fixed manual CBOR encoder offset initialization and length returns
